name: LoyaltyLion E-commerce Loyalty Program API
what_it_does: LoyaltyLion e-commerce loyalty REST API for Shopify and custom e-commerce merchants to run data-driven loyalty programs with advanced segmentation, email marketing integration, and detailed analytics for customer retention optimization. Enables AI agents to manage customer loyalty account and point balance for loyalty automation, handle loyalty event processing and point award for engagement automation, access loyalty segment creation and targeted reward configuration for personalized loyalty automation, retrieve program analytics and cohort analysis for retention intelligence automation, manage email platform integration for loyalty-triggered email automation, handle reward catalog and redemption configuration for incentive management automation, access campaign creation and promotion management for loyalty campaign automation, retrieve at-risk customer identification for proactive retention automation, manage custom activity and event tracking for advanced loyalty earning automation, and integrate LoyaltyLion with Klaviyo, Attentive, Yotpo, Okendo, and Shopify for end-to-end loyalty ecosystem automation.
use_cases: Identifying at-risk customers from retention prediction agents
Triggering loyalty campaigns from email integration agents
Managing reward configurations from program optimization agents
Tracking cohort retention from loyalty analytics agents
not_for: Non-e-commerce loyalty programs (LoyaltyLion is e-commerce specific)
SMB with very low transaction volume (free alternatives like Smile.io Free are more cost-effective)
best_when: An e-commerce brand wanting AI agents to automate data-driven loyalty program management, at-risk customer identification, email-triggered loyalty campaigns, and cohort retention analysis through LoyaltyLion's analytics-rich loyalty platform.
avoid_when: SHOPIFY API INTEGRATION REQUIRES APP INSTALL FOR FULL AUTOMATION: LoyaltyLion full Shopify integration (automatic point earning on purchase, checkout discount redemption) requires Shopify app installed; API-only integration has reduced automation scope; automated loyalty program via API-only misses automatic purchase event listening. ADVANCED SEGMENTATION PLAN GATING: LoyaltyLion advanced segmentation features (behavioral segments, predictive churn) are gated to higher plans; automated retention workflows using advanced segmentation must verify plan supports feature; automated segment-based campaign that uses advanced segments on basic plan creates feature unavailable error. ANALYTICS DATA FRESHNESS FOR REAL-TIME AUTOMATION: LoyaltyLion analytics (cohort analysis, at-risk customer identification) processes with data delay; automated real-time retention intervention workflows must account for analytics freshness lag; automated at-risk customer campaign triggered on real-time purchase data may operate on analytics showing earlier customer state.

auth.notes: LoyaltyLion uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ. Founded 2012 by Charlie Casey and David Haddad. Backed by BGF Ventures, DN Capital ($12M+ raised). Products: Points program, referrals, VIP tiers, analytics, email integrations, custom activities. Platforms: Shopify, Shopify Plus, BigCommerce, custom. GDPR. Serves mid-market e-commerce brands. Competes with Smile.io, Yotpo Loyalty, and Antavo for Shopify loyalty programs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — free trial available
pricing.paid_tiers: Small ($399/mo), Medium ($729/mo), Large ($1,299/mo); based on monthly active customers; annual contract discount
pricing.notes: London UK. BGF/DN Capital backed. Active-customer-based pricing. Annual contract. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; customer and event queries throttled; webhooks for point earn, tier change, and redemption events

known_agent_gotchas: CUSTOMER MERCHANT ID REQUIRED — NOT LOYALTYLION ID: LoyaltyLion customer lookup uses merchant-side customer ID (Shopify customer ID) not LoyaltyLion's internal ID; automated loyalty management must maintain merchant customer ID as primary identifier; automated API calls using LoyaltyLion-internal customer ID formats encounter customer not found errors

POINT AWARD IDEMPOTENCY KEY FOR AUTOMATED EVENTS: LoyaltyLion point award API supports idempotency key to prevent duplicate awards; automated event-driven point award must include idempotency key derived from event source ID; automated point award without idempotency key creates duplicate award risk when event webhook is retried on failure

ACTIVITY TYPE REGISTRATION BEFORE CUSTOM EVENT TRACKING: LoyaltyLion custom activity types must be registered in program configuration before tracking events of that type; automated custom event award workflow must verify activity type exists before tracking; automated custom event tracking for unregistered activity type silently fails without error

EMAIL INTEGRATION SYNC DELAY FOR LOYALTY SEGMENT TARGETING: LoyaltyLion loyalty data sync to email platforms (Klaviyo, Attentive) has processing delay; automated email campaign using loyalty segment (Gold tier, at-risk) must account for sync delay; automated same-day loyalty tier upgrade followed by immediate email segment campaign may use pre-upgrade segment data

POINT EXPIRY TRANSACTION vs EARNED BALANCE CALCULATION: LoyaltyLion point expiry creates negative point transaction in history; automated point balance calculation must correctly handle expiry transactions in balance calculation; automated balance display that sums all positive transactions without accounting for expiry transactions overstates customer point balance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Loyalty platform. GDPR. API key. EU/US. Customer loyalty and rewards data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Loyalty platform. GDPR. API key. EU/US. Customer loyalty and points data.
